name: pastevault-mac-packaging
description: Separate macOS packaging configuration for PasteVault.

scripts.dist:mac:zip: cd ../.. && npm run build && npx electron-builder --config packaging/mac/electron-builder.json --mac zip
scripts.dist:mac:dmg: cd ../.. && npm run build && npx electron-builder --config packaging/mac/electron-builder.json --mac dmg
